div.h2: Particle System: 7 fields per struct, cache-line waste on partial access

g.text: Hardware Trace: Accessing p[0].x, p[0].y, p[0].z
Particle | Base Offset | x | y | z | vx | vy | vz | mass
Data Loaded per Cache Line | 64 bytes

text.tspan: // Already cached! But still waste 16 bytes
// Already cached! But still waste 16 bytes
// CPU loads entire cache line on first access

g.text: │ Cost: ~200 cycles (L1 miss) or ~4 cycles (L1 hit)
Access p[0].y at 0x04 → CACHE HIT (same line)
Access p[0].z at 0x08 → CACHE HIT (same line)
